refs.purpose: Decide which change-set-exposed outputs and promoted checkpoints make meaningful new assertions, and how much a baseline assertion must loosen when an edit intentionally changes an output.
refs.trigger: When adding assertions for a newly exposed output or a new step, or reconciling a baseline assertion an edit invalidates.

refs.purpose: Distinguish accepted IWC-style test shortcuts from assertion smells when loosening a baseline assertion or synthesizing a new one.
refs.trigger: When considering existence-only, size-only, image-dimension, or tolerant output checks, or recording an omission.

refs.purpose: Record job-input fixtures for change-set-added inputs (remote-URL-first locations, hashes, collection shapes) as fixture provenance, reusing the baseline's existing fixtures unchanged.
refs.trigger: When a change-set adds a workflow input that needs new test data, or when recording provenance for a new fixture.

refs.purpose: Pick the assertion family and tolerance for each change-set-driven expected output by output type.
refs.trigger: When turning a change-set behavioral delta into assertion intent and a tolerance.

refs.purpose: Keep the plan addressable by stable labels and artifacts Planemo can connect back to invocations, jobs, and outputs.
refs.trigger: When recording the labels and checkpoints the downstream test must address.

refs.purpose: Output contract: the emitted plan conforms to [[galaxy-workflow-test-plan]]. Cast bundles the JSON Schema so the skill carries its output shape; validate with `foundry validate-galaxy-workflow-test-plan`.
refs.verification: Cast the skill, run on a summary with existing tests plus a change-set, confirm the emitted YAML validates and downstream [[implement-galaxy-workflow-test]] consumes it without re-reading the change-set.

refs.purpose: Input contract: read the existing workflow's `tests[]` (the regression baseline) and its resolved input/output labels so baseline assertions bind to real labels.
Use the Galaxy workflow tests schema as the assertion-family vocabulary when carrying forward or synthesizing assertion intent.
refs.trigger: When naming an assertion family or compare operator for a carried-forward or change-set-driven expected output.

produces.description: Reviewable Galaxy workflow test plan (see [[galaxy-workflow-test-plan]]): baseline cases carried forward as test-evidence plus change-set-driven cases/assertions, with job inputs, expected outputs, assertion intent, fixture provenance, label status, unresolved mappings, and omissions.

consumes.description: Structured summary of the existing workflow from [[summarize-galaxy-workflow]]; its `tests[]` are the regression baseline to carry forward, and its resolved input/output labels are the anchors baseline assertions bind to.
Reviewed, step-anchored change-set from [[interview-to-galaxy-workflow-changeset]]; names which edits change observable behavior, hence which baseline cases to update and which new assertions to add.
